message:
feat: Redesign project cards with star counts and enhanced UX

Complete visual redesign of project cards with GitHub star badges,
improved accessibility, and polished hover interactions.

Star count display:
- Parse badge text for star counts (regex: /^([\d.]+[KkMm]?)\s+stars?$/)
- Extract and display stars in golden badge (2.8K, 756, etc.)
- Gradient background (amber-500 to yellow-500)
- Star icon with amber-400 fill
- Supports K/M suffixes for large numbers
- Falls back to original badge text if not star count

GitHub indicator:
- Detect GitHub URLs (includes "github.com/")
- Show small GitHub icon next to "Open source" label
- Subtle slate-500 color
- Fixed URL detection to require trailing slash (security)

Visual enhancements:
- Gradient background (slate-950/90 → slate-900/90)
- Subtle gradient overlay on hover (opacity: 0 → 0.05)
- Enhanced hover state:
  - Translate up 1.5px
  - Border color shift to sky-500/60
  - Glow shadow (shadow-sky-500/10)
  - Ring accent (ring-2)
- Title color transition on hover (slate-50 → sky-200)
- Backdrop blur for glass-morphic effect
- Rounded tag pills with ring accents

Smart tag display:
- Show first 4 tags only
- Display "+N" badge for remaining tags
- Prevent overflow on smaller screens
- Tags transition colors on card hover
- Rounded corners with subtle ring borders

Accessibility improvements:
- Add aria-hidden="true" to decorative Star icon
- Add aria-hidden="true" to decorative GitHub icon
- Proper semantic HTML with article element
- External link indicators (target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer")
- Keyboard accessible (inherits from Link component)

Link wrapper:
- Entire card is clickable (better UX)
- Opens in new tab for external links
- Proper rel attributes for security
- Block display for full-width cards

Icon animations:
- ArrowUpRight translates on hover (0.5px X and Y)
- Smooth transitions on all interactive elements
- Duration: 300ms for overlay, instant for others

Typography:
- Consistent text sizing and spacing
- Leading-relaxed for better readability
- Truncation handled by container height

Layout improvements:
- Flex column with h-full for equal heights
- Proper spacing between sections
- Responsive gap adjustments
- Items aligned for visual balance

Bug fixes:
- GitHub detection now requires "/" to avoid false matches
- Proper z-index stacking (overlay at 0, content at 10)
- Overflow hidden to contain gradient overlay

Performance:
- CSS transitions only (no JS)
- GPU-accelerated transforms
- Efficient hover states

Impact:
- Clear visual hierarchy showing project popularity
- Professional, modern design
- Better accessibility for screen readers
- Improved user engagement (higher CTR expected)
- Secure external link handling
- Consistent with overall site aesthetic

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
